title: Secret BYG Doors
description: Addon for Oh the Biomes You'll Go and Secret Doors for BYG-specific secret doors (and trapdoors)
body:
Addon for [Oh The Biomes You'll Go](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomesyougo) and [Super Secret Doors](https://modrinth.com/mod/super-secret-doors) that adds in BOP-specific secret doors!  Includes doors and trapdoors for

- all wood types, including planks, logs (in both orientations), and stripped logs (ditto)
- all bookshelf types
- sandstone types
- blue and yellow netherbricks
- and more!
